name: I'm in the ruins of an intergalatic ZOO
description: I'm in the ruins of an intergalatic ZOO
hints: The ruins of an intergalactic zoo. There's a creature here.
The Rigilian Dia-Ice Hound is here. It may be useful.
The hound can help you with the ice mound puzzle later.
Take the HOUND with you. It can burrow through ice. Go S to return to jungle.
notes: Ruined intergalactic zoo. The Ice Hound can help with the ice mound puzzle.
